desc: Snaps selected family instances to the nearest wall face.
summary: Snaps selected family instances to the nearest wall face. Room-aware: prefers room boundary walls so elements stay inside their room. After importing blocks via ImportCommand, wall-mounted items may be placed at the correct XY/Z but not snapped to the wall face — this command fixes that. Uses ObtainRoomBoundaryWalls to resolve room boundary walls. Uses ElementTransformUtils for move and rotate operations.
usecase: After importing blocks via ImportCommand, select wall-mounted items and snap them to walls.
notfor: Snapping elements to floors, ceilings, or other surfaces. Not for elements that aren't family instances. Not for creating new elements.
precondition: Active document; one or more family instances selected.
postcondition: Selected family instances moved to nearest wall face and rotated to face wall normal. Z height unchanged.

selection_inputs.name: FamilyInstances
selection_inputs.description: Family instances to snap to nearest wall
selection_inputs.prompt: Select family instances to snap to walls

outputs.name: snapped
outputs.description: Number of elements snapped to walls

outputs.name: skipped
outputs.description: Number of elements with no wall nearby

outputs.name: failed
outputs.description: Number of elements that failed to snap

preprompts: Snapping selected elements to nearest walls...
Aligning family instances to wall faces...
thinkingsteps: Collecting all walls from host and linked models...
Moving and rotating elements to wall face...
successprompts: Done — {snapped} elements aligned to wall faces.
failureprompts: Could not snap elements to walls — {error}
